description_long: This is a rustic, two-wheeled wooden barrow with a rectangular tray and sturdy side panels. The tray is bordered by raised wooden slats on all sides, providing containment for transported items. Two long, straight wooden handles extend from one end, designed for manual pushing or pulling. The wheels are large, round, and side-mounted, constructed from wood with a reinforced central hub, and are attached to the lower sides of the tray. The barrow also features short support legs at the front, allowing it to stand upright when not in motion. The overall finish is matte, with a dark brown coloration and visible wood grain texture.
description: A dark brown, wooden two-wheeled barrow with a rectangular tray, raised side panels, and long straight handles for manual transport.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open tray, raised side panels, and the two handles extending forward.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the tray, the large side-mounted wheel, and the support legs at the front.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back panel of the tray and both wheels symmetrically.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the other wheel, tray depth, and the handles extending backward.
